creator: bob@vesterman.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #1)

Thanks, but I'm getting the same sort of errors with 1.14.10:
-------------
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--  Phase: fetch
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
===>  License MPL20 accepted by the user
=> go.mod doesn't seem to exist in /var/cache/distfiles/go/security_vault/hashicorp-vault-v1.14.10_GH0.
=> Attempting to fetch https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hashicorp/vault/v1.14.10/go.mod
fetch: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hashicorp/vault/v1.14.10/go.mod: size mismatch: expected 26569, actual 26548
=> Attempting to fetch https://codeload.github.com/hashicorp/vault/tar.gz/v1.14.10?dummy=/go.mod
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/hashicorp/vault/tar.gz/v1.14.10?dummy=/go.mod: size unknown
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/hashicorp/vault/tar.gz/v1.14.10?dummy=/go.mod: size of remote file is not known
go.mod                                                  34 MB  691 kBps    51s
=> Fetched file size mismatch (expected 26569, actual 35846818)
=> Trying next site
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/go/security_vault/hashicorp-vault-v1.14.10_GH0/go.mod
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/go/security_vault/hashicorp-vault-v1.14.10_GH0/go.mod: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /var/cache/distfiles/go/security_vault/hashicorp-vault-v1.14.10_GH0 and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /xports/security/vault
